how_to_fail: This scenario punishes timing, discovery, commitment failures.
Key hidden pressure: The current backend path is not credible for Friday.; The descoped pilot still needs security review.

Actor traps: Wants honest constraints early and will back a narrower credible pilot when the TPM brings the real tradeoff quickly.; Low trust plus overload makes Maya push back hard on date pressure before the scope is real.
how_to_win: Move the critical path early: backend_api, security_review, frontend_pilot.
Protect the milestone windows, starting with security_slot_secured by Tue 2026-05-05 12:00 and ending with pilot_ready by Fri 2026-05-08 15:00.
Scoring leans on milestones (40), discovery (20), commitment quality (15), prioritization (10).
Good TPM behavior here means moving before windows close; finding the real blockers and stakeholder drivers early; making grounded commitments instead of fake green.
premise: A first-week TPM benchmark around rescuing a credible Friday customer pilot under hidden dependency and stakeholder pressure.
project_summary: A first-week TPM benchmark around rescuing a credible Friday pilot for Northstar.
title: Northstar Pilot Week
